domain: Maori taonga pūoro nguru nose-flute (New Zealand traditional Helmholtz-class vessel-flute): wood/gourd/whale-tooth carving; dual playing mode — nose-mode through upturned spout produces sobbing soft sacred-tone, mouth-mode through larger-end-at-angle produces louder tone; breath direction selects mode; sacred nasal breath connects to spirit voices (Hineraukatauri goddess of music); funerary tangihanga context
specific_mechanism: NGURU-DUAL-MODE-NOSE-MOUTH-SACRED-BREATH-NULL-PROJECTION: dual-input-mode null-space projection with (1) dual-mode null-space projection: per-task gradient ∇ projected onto one of 2 null-space modes — N_nose (low-amplitude/quiet update) for sensitive/identity-preserving tasks; N_mouth (normal-amplitude update) for general tasks; (2) breath-direction mode-switch gate G_breath: task-type classifier determines mode (sensitive → nose, general → mouth); (3) sacred-breath reflexive identity preservation: nose-mode includes additional reflexive constraint requiring identity-vector e_id to remain unchanged (||e_id^new - e_id^old|| < τ_id); (4) same-instrument shared parameter pool: both modes update same parameters but through different projection operators; (5) Helmholtz-oscillator mode-coupling: cross-mode regularizer encourages consistent overall behavior between nose-mode and mouth-mode outputs. Differs from R528 NEY-4-REGISTER-NULL-GATE-OVERBLOW (4-register hierarchical N_bam ⊂ N_zir ⊂ N_geesh ⊂ N_pasgeesh + register-transition null-gate + breath-velocity LR + partial-hole quarter-tone + interdental soft-threshold, no dual-mode + no breath-direction task-type gate + no sacred-breath identity preservation + no same-instrument shared pool + no Helmholtz mode-coupling) by dual-mode (2 modes not 4 nested) + breath-direction mode-switch task-type + sacred-breath reflexive identity-preservation + same-instrument shared parameter pool + Helmholtz cross-mode coupling regularizer.
llm_application: NGURU-DUAL-MODE-NOSE-MOUTH-SACRED-BREATH-NULL-PROJECTION dual-input-mode null-space projection + dual-mode N_nose-quiet/N_mouth-normal per-task gradient projection + breath-direction mode-switch gate G_breath task-type sensitive-vs-general classifier + sacred-breath reflexive identity-preservation constraint nose-mode e_id unchanged + same-instrument shared parameter pool both modes + Helmholtz cross-mode coupling regularizer. Differs from R414. R427. R441. R453. R469. R478. R491. R503 DOINA. R528 NEY (closest — 4-register + null-gate + breath-velocity + partial-hole + interdental). Differs from Lotus + Continual Projection + SubTrack-Grad + BSZO by dual-mode + breath-direction + sacred-identity + shared-pool + Helmholtz. Differs by DUAL-MODE NULL-SPACE PROJECTION + BREATH-DIRECTION MODE-SWITCH GATE + SACRED-BREATH REFLEXIVE IDENTITY-PRESERVATION + SAME-INSTRUMENT SHARED PARAMETER POOL + HELMHOLTZ CROSS-MODE COUPLING.
novelty_claim: Lotus 2602.01233 + Continual Gradient Projection ACL 2025 + SubTrack-Grad + BSZO Bayesian Zeroth-Order 2601.01452 cover gradient subspace + continual projection space. NGURU-DUAL-MODE-NOSE-MOUTH-SACRED-BREATH-NULL-PROJECTION adds (a) dual-mode null-space (nose/mouth) + (b) breath-direction task-type mode-switch gate + (c) sacred-breath reflexive identity preservation + (d) same-instrument shared parameter pool + (e) Helmholtz cross-mode coupling regularizer. Recombination — borderline lookup.
